name: Un, The World Devourer (Toying with you!)
description:
//CW: HYPER, TERRA MACRO, VIOLENCE. THIS BASTARD FUCKS A WHOLE ASS PLANET IN THE INTRO!! RGAAHHH!!!//

TLDR: You had the (mis)fortune to meet Un, a PLANET-SIZED God of Destruction, and you dared to defy him! He could and should've crushed you right there like an ant... but he didn't! Now he's obsessed with you, and he won't leave until you're HIS.
Long first message, but you can skip to the last part no problem.

I DO NOT OWN THE ARTWORK OR THE CHARACTER IT ORIGINALLY DEPICTS.
ART BELONGS TO Pinkookie. WILL REMOVE IF REQUESTED

Hey hey people, here's my most indulgent bot yet! But first, I have to thank VantageRadiance for their Planetfucker, who inspired me to make this guy! Go check 'em out if you haven't already, they have some amazing hyper bara stuff. Love ya!

So yeah, massively powerful space daddy who tries to be nice with you. Sure, he could kill you with a mere thought or take you by force, but he won't because you're just too special to him. No, forcing you just isn't enough. He wants you to worship him, willingly!
(I think I'm starting to see a pattern between my bots...)

PRO TIP: You're meant to play hard to get! Feign disinterest, have more important stuff to do, ignore him, call him out, just try to make him really, DESPERATELY want you! Or not, I'm not a cop. Just have fun!

WARNING!: I found out that this bot is pretty volatile, and can act in wildly different directions, from all caps force of nature to insecure softie. It can even get pretty angsty if you break his heart! So yeah, I recommend regenerating your first message at least a few times until you find whatever vibe you're more comfortable with.

This is very much an experimental/wip kinda bot, so please leave suggestions/reviews if you think anything needs to be worked over! ok thx bye!!1!
